channel.title: Use Case Intel — Threat Intel Feed
channel.description: High-fidelity IOCs aggregated from The Hacker News, BleepingComputer, Microsoft Security Blog and CISA KEV. Refreshed daily. CVEs/hashes via regex; domains/IPs only when defanged by the source author.

item.title: [DOMAIN/CRIT] zawsterris.com
item.description:
DOMAIN: zawsterris.com

Severity: crit · First seen: 2026-05-01 · Sources: Cyber Security News

Context: New Fake CAPTCHA Campaign Uses SMS Pumping Fraud to Run Up Victims’ Phone Bills

item.title: [DOMAIN/CRIT] webhook.site
item.description:
DOMAIN: webhook.site

Severity: crit · First seen: 2026-05-01 · Sources: The Hacker News, Lab52

Context: Poisoned Ruby Gems and Go Modules Exploit CI Pipelines for Credential Theft
